active_arcs.promoted_to_watching_reason: Two signals in calibration batch: Aug 28 DARVO pivot on church etiquette discussion; Oct 1 contemptuous humiliation ('Are you stupid?' + brother cognitive comparison). Both show same structural pattern: Eli's legitimate communication met with contemptuous counter-attack rather than engagement.
active_arcs.promoted_to_active_reason: Halloween cluster (ROW-619-659, Oct 31) is 3rd signal and first Sev 2 instance — sustained 6+ hour campaign deploying full DARVO sequence, sustained guilt, contemptuous attacks, child-emotions weaponized, martyrdom positioning. Pattern confirmed as structural and recurring (ADD-001). Threshold met: 3 signals + escalation to Sev 2 sustained campaign.

signals.summary: DARVO pivot on church etiquette discussion. Eli raises co-parenting concern → Melissa attacks Eli's own church conduct ('text me while church is going on / sit and draw') → 'Check your own etiquette' reverses the frame. Partial DARVO (ADD-001 partial = Sev 1).

Contemptuous humiliation following Eli's scheduling error: 'Are you stupid?' + brother cognitive comparison. ADD-002 applied: brother reference was general intelligence insult, not targeted trauma weaponization. Disproportionate contempt attack.

Contemptuous parenting attack with child-complaint relay and DARVO pivot. 'Half ass paying attention to her' (contempt, ADD-002) + Olivia's noise complaint relayed as ammunition (ADD-003 embedded) + pivot to required-intermediary accusation (ROW-416). Partial DARVO.

Halloween cluster — sustained multi-tactic campaign (6+ hours). Full DARVO (ADD-001 Sev 2) + sustained guilt + contempt ('house bitch and taxi'; 'pathetic'; 'I don't know how you live with yourself') + child-emotions weaponized + martyrdom positioning + Abby-as-obstacle framework introduced. ACTIVE promotion event.
Post-Halloween standalone guilt message: 'You know that buying her things doesn't substitute spending time with her right?' Continued inadequacy framing one day after Halloween campaign.

active_arcs.abby_framework_note: Abby-as-obstacle narrative first deployed as major RF-04 lever Oct 31 (B-002). Track recurrence across subsequent batches — this framework likely intensifies as the relationship becomes established.

watching_arcs.promoted_to_watching_reason: Second signal ROW-545 (Oct 23): 'She said you were kissing her way too much on Friday' — child complaint relayed without protective framing. Two signals across two separate episodes confirm the mechanism is not isolated. CANDIDATE → WATCHING.

signals.summary: Savage Love car relay: Melissa sang 'did somebody break your heart?' to Olivia; Olivia said 'yeah. My dad when he left me'; Melissa immediately relayed this to Eli. Child's expressed grief about abandonment transmitted as guilt delivery. Sev 2 (abandonment framing, emotional weight). Text-record sufficiency confirmed (ADD-003).

Kiss complaint relay: 'She said you were kissing her way too much on Friday.' Child behavioral complaint relayed without protective framing. Embedded adequacy judgment (Eli is overbearing). Sev 1 (brief relay, no added pressure framing, lighter emotional weight than Savage Love).

watching_arcs.promotion_threshold: ACTIVE requires 3rd signal OR a relay that involves extended pressure framing ('she cried,' 'she's devastated,' 'she's begging you') per ADD-003. Watch for relay pattern in subsequent batches.
watching_arcs.rf01_crossref_note: This arc overlaps structurally with ARC-RF01-001 (abandonment narrative). The RF-04 arc tracks the guilt-delivery mechanism to Eli; the RF-01 arc tracks the narrative-building to/through Olivia. Both can be active simultaneously. Halloween cluster ROW-656/659 ('Your daughter is begging you') noted as cross-signal element but subsumed under ARC-RF04-001 primary classification.
watching_arcs.cross_signal_note: Halloween cluster (ROW-619-659) contains child-emotions-weaponized elements (ROW-656, 659) that overlap with this arc's mechanism. These are credited to ARC-RF04-001 as the primary arc for that episode given DARVO/contempt dominance. ARC-RF04-002 credit accrues from the distinct relay episodes (ROW-545 etc.) rather than from compound-campaign episodes.

compound_patterns.label: Halloween 2022 Multi-RF Campaign
compound_patterns.description: First instance of simultaneous multi-RF activation in one episode. RF-04 (primary, Sev 2 — DARVO/guilt/contempt/child-weaponized) + RF-01 (inadequate-father/Abby-prioritization narrative, Sev 2 peripheral) + RF-05 (contemptuous/aggressive language, Sev 1 peripheral) + RF-09 (reality distortion/logic-trap, Sev 1 peripheral). The Abby-as-obstacle framework introduced here serves both RF-04 (guilt delivery) and RF-01 (alienating narrative) simultaneously.

cross_rf_arc_notes.RF-01: ARC-RF01-001 ACTIVE (27 signals, all 31 batches complete). Structural overlap with ARC-RF04-002: the same child-relay mechanism serves BOTH RF-01 (inadequate-father narrative delivery) and RF-04 (guilt delivery to Eli). Each RF pass tracks its distinct aspect. Halloween cluster reinforces ARC-RF01-001 with Abby/Milo prioritization sub-arc.
cross_rf_arc_notes.RF-02: ARC-RF02-001 ACTIVE (required-intermediary arc). ROW-416 (B-002) is a peripheral RF-02 signal — Eli coordinating with Olivia directly framed as a violation. Structural adjacency: RF-04 emotional campaigns frequently co-occur with gatekeeping enforcement context.
